questions.prompt: What number is shown by these base-ten blocks?
questions.hint: Count the Ten rod as 10, then count on the Ones: 11, 12, 13, 14.

questions.prompt: Represent the number 12 using blocks. Add 1 Ten and 2 Ones.
questions.hint: Click '+10' once to add a Ten rod, then click '+1' twice to add 2 Ones.

questions.prompt: What number is shown by these base-ten blocks?
questions.hint: Count the tens first: 10, 20. Then count on the six ones: 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26.

questions.prompt: Represent the number 25 using blocks. Add the correct number of Tens and Ones.
questions.hint: You need 2 Ten rods (20) and 5 Ones blocks (5) to make 25.

questions.prompt: What number is shown by these base-ten blocks?
questions.hint: Count by tens: 10, 20, 30. There are no ones blocks.
